title: Canopy Growth (CGC): Navigating a Volatile Cannabis Landscape Towards Profitability
text: Canopy Growth Corporation faces a volatile cannabis landscape while making strategic moves toward profitability. The company has undergone continuous transformation over the past decade, with strategic mergers and acquisitions central to growth, including acquisitions of Bedrocan Canada, Mettrum Health, and various international expansions. Major actions for transformation include selling off Canadian retail operations, consolidating the cultivation platform to two purpose-built facilities, and discontinuing BioSteel. The establishment of Canopy USA to enter the U.S. market culminated in the acquisition of Acreage Holdings, Wana Wellness, and Jetty Extracts by December 2024. The company demonstrated improving financial metrics with adjusted EBITDA losses narrowing significantly in fiscal 2025 and 2026.
